comment: 55yo female, no documented age-appropriate cancer screening within past 5 years (no CRC modality on file, last mammogram >7y ago, no cervical screening on file, never-smoker so LDCT not applicable). No personal cancer diagnosis. Engine fires RF-UNIVERSAL-AGE-50PLUS-SCREENING-GAP (universal demographic flag; composite trigger age>=50 AND age_50plus_screening_gap_documented=true) → routes to PreventionPlan: comprehensive screening catch-up (CRC modality choice per USPSTF 2021, biennial mammography per USPSTF 2024, hr-HPV-primary q5y or co-test per USPSTF 2018), prioritized by highest-yield modality with shared-decision overlay. Validates v0.3 universal demographic RF — relevant_diseases=["*"], sidecar documentation only.
